text:
The first space is an open, modern room—minimal, quiet, almost meditative. I feel a sense of calm, but also a hint of isolation. The soft furnishings invite me to pause and think, but the emptiness echoes with unanswered questions, as if waiting for purpose or presence.

The second scene immerses me in colorful stimulation—words, screens, knowledge begging for engagement. Here, I sense curiosity mixing with a slight overwhelm from the rush of ideas. The reminders of R+D (Research and Development) provoke contemplation about progress and our endless pursuit of understanding. I feel energized, but also slightly lost in the sea of information.
